posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am currently using a JotForm that allows team members to request access to a locker. I have 30 lockers available and would like to rotate their use on either a 12-hour or 24-hour basis. Ideally, lockers 1-30 would be assigned on a first-come, first-served basis. Once a locker is assigned, it cannot be reassigned to another person within the same 12/24-hour period (still to be determined). If all lockers are occupied, the form should notify the requester that no lockers are available at the moment.

Is this functionality possible?
